name: Chaos Beast
name_jp: カオス・ビースト－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>混</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>沌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
name_jp_tl: Chaos Beast - Demon Beast of Chaos -
desc:
1 LIGHT Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner DARK monsters
If any card(s) have been banished this turn, this card gains 1000 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Chaos Beast" once per turn. You can target 1 of your banished LIGHT or DARK monsters; add it to your hand. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your hand and/or GY, except this card; Special Summon this card from your GY.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Requires Attribute specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
